pageContext.name: Lilo and Stitch
pageContext.description: The Disney Traditions collection by Jim Shore combines the magic of Disney collectibles with the time-honored motifs of handcrafted folk art. Celebrating the 20th anniversary of Lilo and Stitch, this darling duo team up for a tiki-lit hula. Lilo dances in her Hawaiian leafed dress and crown while Stitch plucks ukulele chords. Together the precious pair remind us of the meaning of Ohana.
